mapper.select: SELECT id, email, name, role, approval_status, store_id, manager_id FROM users ORDER BY id
SELECT id, email, name, role, approval_status, store_id, manager_id FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, email, name, role, password_hash, approval_status, store_id, manager_id FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, email, name, role, password_hash, approval_status, store_id, manager_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{email}, #{name}, #{role}, #{passwordHash}, #{approvalStatus}, #{storeId}, #{managerId})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET approval_status = #{approvalStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, name, role, approval_status, store_id, manager_id FROM users WHERE approval_status = #{approvalStatus} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, email, name, role, approval_status, store_id, manager_id FROM users WHERE manager_id = #{managerId}
